title: TechnoPandora [No Sodium]
description: A small modpack focused on technology.   Does not include Sodium mod and addons.
body:
TechnoPandora [Fabric] [No Sodium]modpack. It aims to give people a technological modpack gameplay using a small number of mods. The difference from the TechnoPandora [Fabric] Modpack is that it does not include sodium and its addons. It is made for devices where sodium mod causes problems.
At the moment I'm thinking of not changing any of the mods' descriptions.


### The tech mod that forms the basis of the modpack is 
- [Oritech](https://modrinth.com/mod/oritech/)
  
### Storage Mods
- [Basic Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/basic-storage/)
- [Tom's Simple Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage/)
### Resources Processing Mods
- [Alloy Forgery](https://modrinth.com/mod/alloy-forgery/)
### Map and Teleportation Mods
- [Antique Atlas 4](https://modrinth.com/mod/antique-atlas-4/)
- [Wraith Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/fwaystones/)
### Some Other Mods
- [Trash Cans](https://modrinth.com/mod/trash-cans/version/)
- [Do a Barrel Roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/do-a-barrel-roll/version/)
- [Moving Elevators](https://modrinth.com/mod/moving-elevators/version/)
- [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi/version/)
- [Jade 🔍](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade/version/)
- [Miners Delight!](https://modrinth.com/mod/miners-delight!/)

The [TechnoPandora [Fabric] [No Sodium]](https://modrinth.com/modpack/technopandora-no-sodium) modpack builds on the [OptiPandora [No Sodium]](https://modrinth.com/modpack/optipandora-no-sodium) modpack and includes mods from there.
